name: Crawfish and Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the crawfish tails in milk for 1 hour, then strain.
2. Melt butter and add flour. Cook over medium heat until smooth.
3. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute more.
4. Gradually whisk in crawfish milk to form a creamy sauce. Simmer until thickened.
5. Stir in Dijon mustard, cayenne pepper, and salt. Simmer for another 5 minutes.
6. Gently add the cooked crawfish tails and chopped green onions. Cook for 3 more minutes.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed. Serve hot over fresh pasta.
